title: spergula platensis
intro: Spergula platensis, also known as sea spurrey or sea sand-spurrey, is a plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly found in coastal areas and salt marshes. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Spergula platensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and is also sometimes combined with other plants to enhance its effects.
